title: Fix Admin Panel UI Duplication and Data Display
description: The admin panel has duplicated UI components. Investigate `frontend/pages/admin` and `frontend/components/Admin`, remove the duplication, and create a single source of truth for the admin layout. After the backend issues are resolved (task p_hotfix_backend_001), ensure the user list and product list pages in the admin panel correctly fetch data from their respective API endpoints and render it, including proper loading and error states.
acceptance_criteria: Duplicated admin panel code is removed and consolidated into a single component/layout.
The admin page for products successfully displays a list of products fetched from the API.
The admin page for users/stats successfully displays data fetched from the API.
The UI correctly handles loading states while data is being fetched.
The UI correctly handles error states if the API calls fail for any reason.
